name: /~/ The Titan Base \~\
description:
"Are You A Titan? Then come on to Universe-214!"

There's another bot of this that I feel like could be better, so I made my own spin on it

I might have a lot of tokens (I like to copy descriptions from the wikis, don't feel like causing my hands unneeded pain)
